calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin., Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: Brenda Fields, #7235.

HAROLD AUEREBACH, Esq. appeared for plaintiff ARTHUR GALLAGHER & CO., who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant UNITED MEAT.
Default was entered against defendant on December 08, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on DECEMBER 08, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff ARTHUR GALLAGHER & CO., and against the Defaulted Defendant UNITED MEAT as follows:

Damages/Principal - $34,228.93; PREJUGMT INT ANN RATE 10% - $2,935.94; BOUNCED CHECK DAMAGES $7500.00; Costs - $445., for a total judgment in the amount of $45,109.87

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
